shadows.name: modal-lift
shadows.purpose: Modals and symbol-search dropdown — the only elements that float above the terminal.

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: Context menus and hover popovers escaping the chrome.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover/active state changes on buttons, chips, tabs, rail items.

motion.name: tooltip-delay
motion.purpose: Hover tooltip show delay; hide is instant on mouseout.

breakpoints.name: dock-collapse
breakpoints.purpose: Right sidebar auto-hides and bottom dock collapses below this width.

breakpoints.name: mobile-gate
breakpoints.purpose: Below this, show reduced single-chart view (TV convention).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one primary action per surface (e.g. alert dialog Create).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--astroneum-primary-color, #6366f1); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 12px; font: 600 13px/1.4 'Trebuchet MS', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Roboto, Ubuntu, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 100ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4f46e5; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--astroneum-primary-color, #6366f1); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Toolbar Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--astroneum-text-color, #d1d4dc); border: none; border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 10px; font: 400 13px/1.4 'Trebuchet MS', -apple-system, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 100ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--astroneum-hover-background-color, #2a2e39); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--astroneum-primary-color, #6366f1); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Icon Button (rail/toolbar)
components.description: 32px square icon button; rail items use 44px hit area.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-icon" aria-label="Settings"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none"><circle cx="10" cy="10" r="3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M10 2v3M10 15v3M2 10h3M15 10h3M4.2 4.2l2.1 2.1M13.7 13.7l2.1 2.1M15.8 4.2l-2.1 2.1M6.3 13.7l-2.1 2.1" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; background: transparent; color: var(--astroneum-text-second-color, #787b86); border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 100ms ease-out, color 100ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-icon:hover { background: var(--astroneum-hover-background-color, #2a2e39); color: var(--astroneum-text-color, #d1d4dc); } .ds-btn-icon.is-active { background: rgba(99,102,241,0.15); color: var(--astroneum-primary-color, #6366f1); } .ds-btn-icon:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--astroneum-primary-color, #6366f1); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Delta Chip
components.description: Delta% chip with sign so direction survives color blindness.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; background: var(--astroneum-hover-background-color, #2a2e39); color: var(--astroneum-text-color, #d1d4dc); border-radius: 3px; padding: 1px 8px; font: 600 11px/1.4 'Trebuchet MS', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-chip-up { background: rgba(38,166,154,0.12); color: #26a69a; } .ds-chip-down { background: rgba(239,83,80,0.12); color: #ef5350; }

components.name: Search Input
components.css: .ds-input { background: var(--astroneum-background-color, #131722); color: var(--astroneum-text-color, #d1d4dc); border: 1px solid var(--astroneum-border-color, #2a2e39); border-radius: 4px; height: 30px; padding: 0 10px; font: 400 13px/1.4 'Trebuchet MS', -apple-system, sans-serif; box-shadow: none; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--astroneum-text-second-color, #787b86); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--astroneum-primary-color, #6366f1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(99,102,241,0.2); }

components.name: Dock Tab
components.description: Bottom-dock / sidebar tab with 2px bottom or 3px left accent on active.
components.css: .ds-tab { background: transparent; color: var(--astroneum-text-second-color, #787b86); border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; padding: 0 14px; height: 36px; font: 400 13px/1.4 'Trebuchet MS', -apple-system, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: color 100ms ease-out; } .ds-tab:hover { color: var(--astroneum-text-color, #d1d4dc); } .ds-tab.is-active { color: var(--astroneum-text-color, #d1d4dc); border-bottom-color: var(--astroneum-primary-color, #6366f1); } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--astroneum-primary-color, #6366f1); outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: Rail Item
components.description: 60px left-rail icon item with 3px left accent on active.
components.html: <button class="ds-rail-item is-active" aria-label="Watchlist"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><rect x="4" y="5" width="16" height="14" rx="1" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-rail-item { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 44px; height: 44px; background: transparent; color: var(--astroneum-text-second-color, #787b86); border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 100ms ease-out, color 100ms ease-out; } .ds-rail-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: var(--astroneum-text-color, #d1d4dc); } .ds-rail-item.is-active { background: rgba(99,102,241,0.15); color: var(--astroneum-primary-color, #6366f1); } .ds-rail-item.is-active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -8px; top: 8px; bottom: 8px; width: 3px; border-radius: 2px; background: var(--astroneum-primary-color, #6366f1); } .ds-rail-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--astroneum-primary-color, #6366f1); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Astroneum Terminal is a dark trading terminal for traders who read fast and act faster. It is an instrument, not a surface: every pixel carries data or makes a control reachable. It mirrors the interaction grammar of the category's reference tool — a 48px top toolbar, 60px left rail, flex chart, 300px right sidebar, 300px bottom dock — because familiarity is the feature and strangeness is the failure. It rejects AI slop and SaaS marketing dressing; motion conveys state only. The chrome is a thin layer over the Astroneum charting library and references its --astroneum-* tokens so shell and canvas stay in lockstep, with a single Cosmic Indigo accent replacing the default blue.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Cosmic Indigo is the only accent. <=10% of any screen, only on primary actions, current selection, and active state.

rules.name: The No-Decoration Rule
rules.body: Up green and down red carry direction only. Never color a surface, border, or label that is not directional data.

rules.name: The Tabular-Data Rule
rules.body: Every vertically stacked numeric value uses tabular-nums. Numbers that don't align are broken.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadow only on elements that physically float (modals, popovers). Panels, cards, buttons, rows are never shadowed.

dos: Do reference var(--astroneum-*) for every chrome color so the shell tracks the library and high-contrast theme.
Do override --astroneum-primary-color: #6366f1 once at the demo root to re-skin chart + chrome together.
Do use tabular-nums on every stacked numeric value.
Do carry + / - on every Delta chip so direction survives color blindness.
Do keep the accent to <=10% of any screen.
Do ship every interactive state: default, hover, focus-visible, active, disabled.
donts: Don't use TradingView's wordmark, logo, marketing voice, or its exact blue #2962ff.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, side-stripe accent borders, or eyebrow kickers.
Don't shadow panels, cards, buttons, or rows — flat by default.
Don't use display fonts in labels, buttons, or data.
Don't animate layout properties or add decorative motion.
Don't color a surface with up-green or down-red.
Don't invent custom scrollbars, form controls, or modal patterns.
Don't ship placeholder metrics or fake activity.
